scope: Make the saved deeper 180 frontier shortlist the primary watchtower/dashboard surface for frontier review

decision_context.prior_state: The watchtower frontier page exposed the full ranked frontier export, and the newly added shortlist was saved but not yet the first operator view.
decision_context.decision: Render the frontier shortlist first on the watchtower page and keep the full export below it.
decision_context.why_now: This makes the current simulator winners easier to inspect immediately from the local dashboard.

files_expected.purpose: Refreshed watchtower frontier page with shortlist-first layout.
Updated page list after refreshing the watchtower snapshot.
Documents the shortlist-first watchtower surface and the shortlist-note resolver fix.

planned_steps: Update the watchtower frontier page to prefer the saved shortlist markdown artifact
Add a regression test for the shortlist-note glob collision
Refresh watchtower_latest so the local dashboard matches the new frontier surface

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_hybrid.py tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The frontier watchtower page renders the shortlist export first
The shortlist-note markdown file is not mistaken for the canonical shortlist export
The refreshed watchtower_latest surface shows the current frontier winners immediately

guardrails: Do not change the underlying frontier checkpoint in this tranche
Do not treat the shortlist as a replacement for the saved readout or full export
Keep the full export available beneath the shortlist for deeper review
